_meta.notes: Field names and values match Surge Discovery create form (Full Mode, 9 steps)

tagline: Proof-of-attendance communities on Solana — where showing up earns you governance, not just a badge.
full_description: Rootcast issues compressed NFTs via Metaplex Bubblegum as on-chain attestations for verifiable community actions — attending a Space, completing a bounty, or being vouched by existing members. Each wallet accumulates a non-transferable Presence Score stored in a Program Derived Address, and that score directly weights votes in an Anchor-based on-chain governance program. Because Solana state compression makes minting 10,000 engagement proofs cost under $1, per-action attestation is economically

logo.note: Surge requires PNG or JPG. Convert SVG → PNG before upload.

dev_tools: Program Derived Addresses (PDA Presence Score ledger)
Helius DAS API (compressed NFT indexing and querying)

pitch_deck.note: Surge requires PDF. Convert PPTX → PDF before upload.

pitch_video.note: Must be public/unlisted YouTube URL. Max 800 seconds.

team_description: The team consists of two Solana protocol engineers with prior experience shipping Anchor programs and SPL token tooling, and one frontend engineer who has built wallet-adapter integrations for two live Solana dApps. The founders previously contributed to a Solana-native DAO tooling project and have direct relationships with several mid-size builder collectives looking for contribution-weighted governance.

roadmap.goal: Deploy core Anchor programs and cNFT issuance pipeline on Solana devnet with a functional prototype
deliverables: Anchor-based Presence Score PDA program deployed to devnet with configurable decay logic and unit tests
Bubblegum cNFT minting flow for time-locked event claim links, tested end-to-end with Helius DAS API indexing
Next.js prototype UI supporting wallet connection, event creation, cNFT claiming, and Presence Score display

roadmap.goal: Launch closed beta with three Solana builder communities on mainnet and ship on-chain governance voting
deliverables: Anchor governance program deployed to mainnet supporting Presence Score-weighted proposals, quorum thresholds, and vote finalization
Vouching graph feature live — three-member vouching flow with minimum Presence Score gate and on-chain social graph PDA records
Public community leaderboard with auditable on-chain proof links, integrated with Dialect notifications for governance alerts

roadmap.goal: Open self-serve community onboarding and reach 20 active communities with measurable governance participation
deliverables: Self-serve community setup wizard allowing admins to configure event types, decay curves, and voting formulas without writing code
Analytics dashboard showing per-community participation rates, Presence Score distribution, and proposal turnout over time
SDK and REST API wrapper over Helius DAS for third-party integrations, enabling Discord bots and external tools to read Presence Scores
